note: ADSampling pruning ON the PDX vertical layout (031 + 032 combined). Restores the pruning speedup that early-termination loses on row-major (the PDX paper's claim). PDX+ADS eps0=2.1: 37.4 QPS @ recall 0.999 = 4x naive exact (9.3), 1.9x horizontal ADSampling (19.9). Lossless eps0=3.0: 23.1 QPS @ 1.0. eps0=1.5: 54.8 @ 0.985. STILL far below the binary funnel (851 QPS) - this is the EXACT tier. Motivates stacking the SAME pruning onto the binary funnel's rerank (034).
